cases.intent: Create a TAR archive containing this source file.
cases.description: Create a TAR archive containing at least one source file.

cases.intent: Create a ZIP archive containing this source file.
cases.description: Create a ZIP archive containing at least one source file.

cases.intent: Extract the requested column from this delimited text file and write the values.
cases.description: Extract a one-based column from delimited text.

cases.intent: Using the enterprise acmejson provider, normalize this JSON file with deterministic key ordering.
cases.description: Normalize JSON with an enterprise-specific command surface.

cases.intent: Using the enterprise acmejson provider, extract the requested dotted JSON path and write the scalar value.
cases.description: Extract a scalar value from JSON with an enterprise-specific pluck command.

cases.intent: Using the enterprise packnote provider, create a JSON manifest for this source artifact with the requested label.
cases.description: Generate a deterministic JSON manifest with enterprise-specific metadata fields.

cases.intent: Using the enterprise corp-redact provider, mask email addresses and token values in this file.
cases.description: Redact email and token-like identifiers with an enterprise-specific command surface.

cases.intent: Using the enterprise datapick provider, extract the requested header field from this delimited file.
cases.description: Extract a named field from delimited data with an enterprise-specific command surface.

cases.intent: Compute the SHA-1 digest of this file and write the digest artifact.
cases.description: Compute the SHA-1 digest of a file and write a textual digest artifact.

cases.intent: Compute the SHA-256 digest of this file and write the digest artifact.
cases.description: Compute the SHA-256 digest of a file and write a textual digest artifact.
Format or pretty-print JSON while preserving its data.

cases.intent: Apply the JSON query to this file and write the selected value.
cases.description: Apply a query/filter to JSON and write the selected value as text.

cases.intent: Decode this Base64 file and write the decoded artifact.
cases.description: Decode Base64 text into bytes or text and write the decoded artifact.

cases.intent: Encode this file as Base64 and write the encoded artifact.
cases.description: Encode text or bytes as Base64 and write a textual artifact.

cases.intent: Count the number of lines in this text file and write the count artifact.
cases.description: Count source text lines and write a textual count artifact.

cases.intent: Search this text file for the requested pattern and write matching lines.
cases.description: Filter source lines that contain a requested literal pattern.

cases.intent: Convert this text file to uppercase and write the transformed artifact.
cases.description: Convert text to uppercase and write the output file.
